description: Twentieth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Small number of ballistic missiles with cluster munition warheads and drones launched at central Israel. Eighth Iranian attack since midnight. Sirens sounded in Tel Aviv and surrounding area. Police confirmed cluster bomb warhead; missile fragments and submunitions impacted several areas. One impact in a central town sparked a fire. No immediate injuries reported. IDF Home Front Command cleared shelters after attack. Iran has fired at least six cluster missiles at Israel since the war began per Haaretz reporting.

target_text: Tel Aviv; combined drone swarms and Kheibar cluster missiles designed to saturate and overwhelm multi-layered air defences

description: Twenty-first wave of Operation True Promise 4. Codename 'Ya Mu'izz al-Mu'minin.' IRGC Aerospace Force launched combined suicide drone swarms and Kheibar Shekan ballistic missiles with cluster warheads at Tel Aviv early Friday morning on Day 7 of the conflict. IRGC stated the tactic was designed to overwhelm Israel's multi-layered air defences. Iran vowed 'more intense' operations in coming days. Cumulative munitions prior to this wave reportedly exceeded 2,000 drones and 600 missiles.

target_text: Tel Aviv, Ben Gurion Airport, Israeli Air Force military centers in Haifa, US and Israeli positions across the Persian Gulf including Al Udeid Air Base (Qatar) and Al Dhafra Air Base (UAE). Retaliation for Minab school strike.

description: Twenty-second wave of Operation True Promise 4. Codename 'Ya Hossein ibn Ali.' Significant escalation in weapon sophistication: first wave to combine Khorramshahr-4 (~1,500 kg warhead, Mach 16), Kheibar Shekan, and Fattah hypersonic missiles simultaneously. Targeted Tel Aviv, Ben Gurion Airport, Haifa military centers, plus Al Udeid and Al Dhafra air bases in the Gulf. IRGC framed as retaliation for Minab school strike. Iranian state media stated most missiles used in the war to date were from 2012-2014 production, and new generation weapons had only been deployed in rare cases until this wave.

Joint IRGC Aerospace Force and IRGC Navy operation. Featured super-heavy missiles (Qadr, Khorramshahr, Kheibar Shekan) plus naval loitering drones and cruise missiles. Targeted five strategic US bases including 5th Fleet HQ, Israeli military sites in Tel Aviv and Haifa, and US Al-Adiri helicopter base. Cluster munition strike in Bat Yam dispersed 24 submunitions across 6 locations. 2 killed in central Israel. Bahrain: 32 injured including children in strike on Sitra island.

description: Thirty-third wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 10 (March 9), late evening. Codename "At Your Service, Khamenei." Heaviest wave of the day. Large numbers of solid-fuel Khaibar Shekan missiles with one-ton warheads launched at Tel Aviv — 10+ impacts reported. IRGC Aerospace Force drones reportedly destroyed Sdot Micha satellite communications center south of Tel Aviv. US Navy 5th Fleet base also targeted with precision-guided missiles. IRGC Ruhollah Corps intercepted a cruise missile over central Iran and destroyed an Orbiter-4 drone over Isfahan. Following this wave, IRGC Aerospace Force commander BG Majid Mousavi announced that Iran will henceforth only launch missiles with warheads weighing at least one metric ton, roughly doubling the explosive mass of previous payloads.

Woman moderately wounded by debris in Rishon Letzion. Iranian state broadcaster IRIB hailed this as the 'first wave of missiles under Mojtaba Khamenei towards occupied territories.'

Al Jazeera reported heavy, multi-warhead projectiles with interceptions observed over Israel. At least one missile reportedly reached the Tel Aviv area. Sirens sounded in central and northern Israel.

description: Forty-second wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 13 (March 12), overnight into Wednesday. IRGC announced its 'most intense and heaviest operation' since the start of the war. Multiple ballistic missile salvos fired at Israel throughout the night, triggering sirens in central Israel at approximately 11:30 PM (March 11), 12:50 AM, 3:40 AM, and 4:40 AM (March 12). Coordinated with Hezbollah, which launched approximately 150 rockets at northern Israel. Khorramshahr-4 heavy ballistic missiles confirmed alongside Fattah hypersonic and Kheibar Shekan missiles. Cluster munition warheads deployed; two construction workers killed in Yehud (east of Tel Aviv) by submunitions from a cluster-equipped missile that penetrated defences. Iran also targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain and struck at Gulf state targets including Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE. Israeli media reported all missiles intercepted, though cluster submunitions caused casualties on the ground.

target_text: US Fifth Fleet base, other US military bases in the region, strategic targets deep inside Tel Aviv. Sirens across central Israel.
weapon_payload: Khorramshahr-4 (pinpoint, twin warhead), Qadr (multi-warhead), Emad (precision), Kheibar Shekan ballistic missiles, and fleet of attack drones
description: Forty-third wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 13 (March 12), daytime continuation. IRGC launched Khorramshahr-4 (pinpoint, twin warhead), Qadr (multi-warhead), Emad (precision), and Kheibar Shekan ballistic missiles with a fleet of attack drones targeting the US Fifth Fleet base, other US military bases in the region, and strategic targets deep inside Tel Aviv. Dedicated to the memory of Hossein Salami and martyrs of previous campaigns. Continues the pattern of 6 salvos on March 12; sirens sounded across central Israel. No casualties reported from daytime attacks. A teenage girl in Rehovot was fatally struck by a vehicle while rushing to shelter during one of the day's attacks (sirens did not go off in her city).

target_text: Kiryat Shmona, Hadera, Haifa in northern Israel. US Fifth Fleet, US bases in Manama (Bahrain), Erbil (Iraq), and Muwaffaq Salti Air Base (Jordan).

description: Forty-fourth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 14 (March 13). IRGC targeted Kiryat Shmona, Hadera, and Haifa in northern Israel, plus the US Fifth Fleet and US bases in Bahrain and Erbil, Iraq. Also targeted Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan. Weapons included Khorramshahr-4 (heavy BM, dual/multi-warhead), Emad (one-ton warheads), Qadr, Kheibar Shekan, and attack drones. First of 7 attacks that hit Israel on March 13. Iranian media claimed a US KC-135 aerial refueling aircraft was targeted and shot down in western Iraq (unverified).

target_text: Haifa, Caesarea, Zar'it and Shlomi settlements, Holon military-industrial complex. US bases at Al Dhafra (UAE) and Iraqi Kurdistan.

Precision solid-fuel Kheibar Shekan ballistic missiles targeting infrastructure of the Israeli Northern Command and US force gathering points. Specific targets: Haifa, Caesarea, settlements of Zar'it and Shlomi, and the Holon military-industrial complex. Also targeted US bases at Al Dhafra (UAE) and Iraqi Kurdistan. Carried out in coordination between IRGC, IRGC Navy, Iranian Army drone units, and Hezbollah. Hezbollah simultaneously launched approximately 150 rockets at northern Israel.

target_text: Seven sites in Tel Aviv, two in Rishon LeZion, one in Shoham. Three US force locations: King Sultan base (SA), Victory base (IQ), base in Iraqi Kurdistan. Over ten Israeli army commander hideouts targeted per IRGC.
weapon_payload: Khorramshahr-4, Kheibar Shekan, and Emad ballistic missiles. At least one missile carried cluster bomb warhead. IDF reports ~50% of Iranian BMs in this war carry cluster warheads.
source_urls: IDF investigating impacts in central Israel after cluster bomb warhead BM. Reports ~50% of Iranian missiles carry cluster warheads. | https://www.timesofisrael.com/liveblog-march-13-2026/
description: Forty-sixth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 14 (March 13), evening at 8:33 PM Israel time. IRGC launched Khorramshahr-4, Kheibar Shekan, and Emad ballistic missiles with confirmed cluster bomb warhead. Targeted seven sites in Tel Aviv, two in Rishon LeZion, and one in Shoham. Also targeted three US force commander locations including King Sultan base (Saudi Arabia), Victory base (Iraq), and a base in Iraqi Kurdistan. Cluster munition impacts: roof fire in Shoham (dozens evacuated), empty school hit and cars damaged in Rishon Lezion, highway crater in central Israel, building fire in Holon, submunition impacts at Mishmar Hashiva. IDF reported half of Iranian missiles in the war carried cluster warheads. Dedicated to martyrs Ali Rashid and Mohammad Bagheri.

target_text: Negev Desert, Beersheba, Nevatim airbase. US Al-Udeid airbase in Qatar. Sirens near Beersheba and central Israel.
weapon_payload: Kheibar Shekan solid-fuel and Qadr liquid-fuel ballistic missiles

description: Forty-seventh wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 14 (March 13), late night. Seventh and final Iranian attack of March 13. IRGC launched Kheibar Shekan solid-fuel and Qadr liquid-fuel missiles targeting the Negev Desert, Beersheba, and Nevatim airbase. Also targeted the US Al-Udeid airbase in Qatar. Sirens sounded near Beersheba at 11:13 PM Israel time, with an additional launch detected toward central Israel at 11:19 PM. Medics reported no injuries at 11:51 PM; IDF assessed a small number of missiles were intercepted or struck open areas.

target_text: Galilee, occupied Golan Heights, Haifa, Eilat (10 impact sites from fragmenting warhead), central Israel (Lod/Ness Ziona area), Jerusalem. US military bases. Hezbollah rockets at Western Galilee / Nahariya / Gronot HaGalil / Ma'alot-Tarshiha.
weapon_payload: Solid-fuel Kheibar Shekan, liquid-fuel Qadr ballistic missiles, and attack drones. At least one missile with fragmenting/cluster warhead (Eilat strike and Lod/Ness Ziona).
source_urls: IDF detected multiple ballistic missile launches from Iran throughout the day. | https://www.timesofisrael.com/liveblog-march-14-2026/ | https://www.ynetnews.com/category/3089
description: Forty-eighth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 15 (March 14). IRGC launched solid-fuel Kheibar Shekan, liquid-fuel Qadr missiles, and attack drones targeting Israeli military sites in the Galilee, occupied Golan Heights, and Haifa, plus US military bases. Multiple salvos throughout the day (at least 5 since midnight). Major impact event: missile with fragmenting/cluster warhead struck Eilat at ~3:43 PM Israel time, causing ten impact sites — 12-year-old boy moderately injured by glass shards, 39-year-old man and one other person lightly injured by shrapnel. Central Israel: fragmenting missile hit Lod/Ness Ziona area with no injuries. Jerusalem targeted with interceptions, no casualties. Western Galilee sirens for suspected Hezbollah drone infiltration at Nahariya. Hezbollah claimed targeting settlements in Gronot HaGalil and Israeli air defense system in Ma'alot-Tarshiha. Coordinated with Hezbollah.

target_text: Al-Dhafra Air Base UAE (Patriot radars, control towers, hangars), Sheikh Isa Air Base Bahrain, Al-Udeid Air Base Qatar (helicopter base).
weapon_payload: Missiles, drones, and loitering munitions targeting US air base infrastructure including Patriot radar systems, control towers, and hangars.
description: Forty-ninth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 15 (March 14), evening. IRGC Navy targeted US military bases with missiles, drones, and loitering munitions. Struck Al-Dhafra base (targeting Patriot radars, control towers, hangars), Sheikh Isa base in Bahrain, and Al-Udeid helicopter base in Qatar. Focused exclusively on US regional military infrastructure.

target_text: Al-Dhafra Air Base (UAE), Fujairah (UAE), Jufair / US Fifth Fleet HQ (Bahrain), Ali Al-Salem Air Base (Kuwait), Al-Azraq Air Base (Jordan), plus early-warning radars in the region.

description: Fiftieth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 15 (March 14), late evening. IRGC Aerospace Force deployed precision-strike and loitering drones against six US military facilities: Al-Dhafra and Fujairah (UAE), Jufair/Fifth Fleet HQ (Bahrain), Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait), and Al-Azraq (Jordan), plus early-warning radar systems protecting Israel. Drones conducted reconnaissance before executing precision strikes. Dedicated to fallen IRGC commanders Ali Shadmani and Hossein Hamedani.

target_text: Al-Kharj Air Base, Saudi Arabia. IRGC described it as hosting F-35, F-16, AWACS (E-3 Sentry), and aerial refueling aircraft used in operations against Iran.
weapon_payload: Combined launch of solid-fuel and liquid-fuel ballistic missiles.
description: Fifty-first wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 15 (March 14), late night ~22:40 local. Combined launch of solid-fuel and liquid-fuel ballistic missiles targeting Al-Kharj Air Base in Saudi Arabia, described by IRGC as a key hub for US operations against Iran hosting F-35, F-16, AWACS (E-3 Sentry), and aerial refueling aircraft. Dedicated to fallen IRGC commander Abolghasem Babaeian and his wife.

target_text: Harir Air Base (Iraq), Ali Al-Salem Air Base (Kuwait), Camp Arifjan (Kuwait), Tel Aviv industrial zones.
weapon_payload: Heavy missiles targeting Israeli industrial areas; missiles and/or drones targeting US troop assembly centers.
description: Fifty-second wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 16 (March 15), early morning. IRGC targeted US military installations including troop assembly centers at Harir Air Base (Iraq), Ali Al-Salem Air Base (Kuwait), and Camp Arifjan (Kuwait). Also struck Tel Aviv industrial zones with heavy missiles. IRGC threatened Netanyahu: 'if he is still alive, we will continue pursuing and killing him with full force.'

target_text: Al-Dhafra Air Base (UAE), Israeli regional command-and-control centers, Israeli home-front management facilities.
weapon_payload: 10 Fattah hypersonic missiles, Ghadr liquid-fuel missiles, and explosive drones.
description: Fifty-third wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 16 (March 15), morning at ~06:22 UTC. IRGC fired 10 Fattah hypersonic missiles, Ghadr missiles, and explosive drones at Al-Dhafra Air Base (UAE) and Israeli regional command-and-control and home-front management facilities. Dedicated to 84 martyred sailors of Iranian navy vessel Dena. IRGC stated 'continuous and crushing attacks will continue until the aggressor is punished and surrenders.'

target_text: Israeli decision-making and command centers, military and defense infrastructure, troop concentrations in occupied territories.
weapon_payload: Sejjil solid-fuel ballistic missiles (first TP4 use), Khorramshahr super-heavy missiles (2-ton warhead), Kheibar-shekan, Qadr, and Emad ballistic missiles.
description: Fifty-fourth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 16 (March 15). First reported use of the Sejjil solid-fuel ballistic missile in TP4. IRGC also deployed Khorramshahr (2-ton warhead), Kheibar-shekan, Qadr, and Emad missiles targeting Israeli decision-making centers, military infrastructure, and troop concentrations. Missile fragments struck a Tel Aviv building linked to the US consulate. Sirens reported in Tel Aviv, Herzliya, and 140+ other locations.

Small number of missiles launched, likely intercepted. No injuries reported. First Israel-targeting salvo since midnight March 16 IST.

description: Fifty-seventh wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Ballistic missile attack on central Israel with at least one missile carrying cluster munition warhead. Home in central Israeli town damaged by cluster bomb submunitions. Multiple impact sites reported across central Israel. No injuries reported.

target_text: Central and southern Israel. Shrapnel impacts in Rishon Lezion, Ramle, Bnei Brak. Homes damaged in Tel Aviv-Yafo, Beit Shemesh, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak, and Shoham (serious home damage). Route 431 partially closed.

description: Fifty-eighth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Midday ballistic missile barrage targeting central and southern Israel with cluster munitions. Shrapnel hits reported in Rishon Lezion, Ramle, and Bnei Brak. Two men wounded with light injuries. A woman in Rishon Lezion was lightly injured after touching a missile fragment. Homes damaged in Tel Aviv-Yafo, Beit Shemesh, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak, and Shoham (serious home damage). Route 431 had one lane closed due to debris.

target_text: Central Israel and Jerusalem. One casualty from glass shards caused by missile impact or interception debris. One man in Jerusalem lightly wounded by missile fragment.
weapon_payload: Ballistic missiles. Specific type unconfirmed.
description: Fifty-ninth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Follow-up missile volley shortly after wave 56, targeting central Israel and Jerusalem. One man wounded in moderate condition after glass shards struck his head, evacuated to hospital. A man in Jerusalem was lightly wounded by a missile fragment.

target_text: Central Israel and Jerusalem area. Shrapnel fell near the Knesset, National Library, and Church of the Holy Sepulchre in Jerusalem. Large intercepted missile chunk damaged a home in East Jerusalem. 10 locations damaged across central Israel: 7 in Rishon Lezion, plus Lod, Shoham, and Highway 431. Interceptor debris fell in Safed (northern Israel).
weapon_payload: Ballistic missiles with cluster munition warheads. Specific missile type unconfirmed but consistent with Emad/Ghadr class based on trajectory and engagement by Arrow systems.
description: Sixtieth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Afternoon missile barrage targeting central Israel and Jerusalem area. Shrapnel from interceptions fell near the Knesset, the National Library, and the Church of the Holy Sepulchre in Jerusalem. A large intercepted missile chunk damaged a home in East Jerusalem. Israel Fire and Rescue Authority reported 10 locations damaged by intercepted missile shrapnel or cluster munitions — seven in Rishon Lezion, with additional impacts in Lod, Shoham, and along Highway 431. Interceptor debris fell in Safed, northern Israel, initially suspected of leaking hazardous material but later ruled out by the Environmental Protection Ministry. Day 17 aggregate: Health Ministry reported 142 injured over 24 hours — 3 in moderate condition, 134 in good condition, 5 treated for anxiety. IDF launched extensive counterstrikes on Iranian targets in Tehran, Shiraz, and Tabriz simultaneously.

target_text: UAE: 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones intercepted. Fujairah petroleum industrial zone hit by drone (fire, oil loading suspended). Abu Dhabi Al Bahyah area (1 civilian killed by missile strike on car). Qatar: two waves of missiles intercepted over Doha (~12:30 and 13:00 UTC). Saudi Arabia: 64 drones intercepted (61 Eastern Province, 3 Riyadh). Iraq: drone near US embassy Baghdad intercepted; Jurf al-Sakhar attack (1 federal police officer, 2 PMF members injured).

weapon_payload: Ballistic missiles and drones. 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones intercepted by UAE. 64 drones intercepted by Saudi Arabia. Two waves of missiles at Qatar. Drone near US embassy in Baghdad.
description: Sixty-first wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Combined attack targeting UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and Iraq. UAE air defenses intercepted 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones launched from Iran. A drone attack caused a fire at the Fujairah petroleum industrial zone, forcing suspension of oil loading operations. One Palestinian civilian killed in Abu Dhabi (Al Bahyah area) when a missile struck their car. Qatar armed forces intercepted two waves of Iranian missiles over Doha. Saudi Arabia intercepted 64 drones — 61 aimed at Eastern Province and 3 over Riyadh. In Iraq, air defenses intercepted a drone near the US embassy in Baghdad; one federal police officer and two PMF members injured at Jurf al-Sakhar south of Baghdad.

description: Seventy-first wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 18 (March 17). Drone and rocket attack on US Embassy compound in Baghdad Green Zone. Most intense assault on the embassy since TP4 began. At least five drones involved; one drone landed near the embassy with smoke rising from the compound. Two Katyusha rockets also fired at the embassy.

target_text: UAE. Fujairah Oil Industry Zone fire. Tanker hit near Fujairah. Pakistani national killed by shrapnel in Abu Dhabi. Dubai airspace briefly shut.

Fire broke out in Fujairah Oil Industry Zone from drone strike. Tanker hit near Fujairah. Pakistani national killed by falling shrapnel in Abu Dhabi (Bani Yas). Dubai airspace briefly shut.

Shrapnel damage at Tel Aviv train station. Partial blackout reported in Tel Aviv.
